title: Hexerei
description: A mod based off witchcraft and lore within it. Welcome to the world of Hexerei!
body:
Welcome to Hexerei! I am absolutely horrible at writing these things, so if you like being a witch then this is perfect for you :)

This mod has things from custom structures in the world to your very own broom to fly around the world to find them. 
Mix up recipes in your cauldron while decorating your own coven with very aesthetic blocks. 

To come - 
 - Coven alignment (faction points basically, for the 3 main covens)
 - Coven witches who will reside within these covens to give you tasks to gain alignment
 - Rituals and spells once enough has been added to work with to begin
